sigWerErrors.reason: 'cô' (miss/madam) introduces a different subject, which changes the meaning and context of the request.
'vui' (please) is a polite request, while 'làm' (do) changes the intent from a polite request to an action, altering the tone and meaning.
'biết' (know) and 'viết' (write) are completely different verbs, changing the meaning of the request.
